mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_refresh_token (user_id, token_id, token, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM tb_refresh_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND expires_at > NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_refresh_token WHERE expires_at < NOW()
